pr.title: Add non-record 10min submission: 11L XSA4 + EMA + GPTQ + FA3 (1.12336724)

output.summary: 11-layer GQA stack uses BigramHash+SmearGate token mixing, XSA late layers, VE, EMA, and GPTQ int6 export with FlashAttention-backed training.
techniques: BigramHash+SmearGate token mixing with XSA on final layers
Late VE, EMA, and delayed QAT before GPTQ int6 export
FlashAttention-3 training path with zstd-compressed submission
